The '''Clone Personal Walker''' was a bipedal [[Walker/Legends|walker]] used by [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

It could carry only one clone trooper with equipment and rations.

{{Veh-stub}}
